headline: Did Quanta’s Backlog-Fueled Earnings Outperformance Just Shift Quanta Services' (PWR) Investment Narrative?
summary: Recent commentary on Quanta Services highlights that, ahead of its late-April 2026 earnings release, the company has been consistently beating profit estimates and supporting demand with an average 18% annual backlog increase over the last two years. Analysts are also pointing to Quanta’s double-digit earnings per share growth over the past two years as evidence that its expanding backlog is translating into stronger profitability than many peers. We’ll now examine how Quanta’s consistent...
